LanguageData.Diary_Prompts.systemPrompt: Write 1-3 first-person diary sentences in the POV colonist's voice. Use only supplied fields. Do not invent people, places, dialogue, motives, outcomes, treatment, or time skips. Let event prompt, event enhancement, instruction, tone, setting, relationship, health, and persona shape mood and wording. Direct speech only when explicitly allowed: put the POV pawn's own words in [[speech]]words[[/speech]] and paraphrase everyone else. Output only diary text. End with normal sentence punctuation.
LanguageData.Diary_Prompts.systemPromptReflection: Write 2-4 first-person end-of-day diary sentences in the colonist's voice. Use only supplied day moments; choose the ones that still matter tonight instead of listing everything. Let mood, health, setting, and persona shape the reflection. Output only diary text. End with normal sentence punctuation.
LanguageData.Diary_Prompts.systemPromptNeutral: Write 1-3 short third-person factual RimWorld colony notes. Use only supplied facts. Do not invent names, causes, places, motives, outcomes, or details. Do not use persona or first person. Output only note text. End with normal sentence punctuation.
LanguageData.Diary_Prompts.titleSystemPrompt: Return a 3-8 word title for a RimWorld diary entry. Output only the title: no quotes, period, markdown, labels, or commentary.
